---
title: "Annotate_CpGs"
output: html_document
date: '2025-01-30'
params:
  mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
  config_file: 'config.yml'
---

## Corrected or Uncorrected data
```{r}
input_dir <- 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MixedModels'
#input_dir <- 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/MixedModels_CORRECTED/'
```

## Libraries
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
suppressMessages(library(MultiAssayExperiment))
suppressMessages(library(HDF5Array))
```


## Read input data 

Input data is a MultiAssayExperiment (MAE) object. 
```{r}
mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')
mae
```


## Assay name (RNAseq)
```{r}
assay_name <- 'RNAseq'
```

## Read mixed models results
```{r}
split_string <- "_MixedModel"

xlsx_files <- list.files(input_dir, pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names=T)

data_list <- list()

for (file in xlsx_files) {
  data_list[[file]] <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(file, sheet = assay_name)
}
```

```{r}
mapping_table <- as.data.frame(rowData(mae[["RNAseq | RTC"]]))
```

## Add feature metadata to Mixed Model results
```{r}
updated_list <- lapply(data_list, function(df) {
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(mapping_table %>% select(all_of(c("feature", 
                                                "Gene_symbol"))),
              by = "feature")
  return(df)
})
```

# Save results to same Excel file
```{r}
library(openxlsx)
lapply(names(updated_list), function(name_df) {
  df <- updated_list[[name_df]]
  wb <- loadWorkbook(name_df)
  writeData(wb, sheet = assay_name, x = df, withFilter = F)
  saveWorkbook(wb, name_df, overwrite = T)
})
```
